title: prasium marrubium
intro: Prasium marrubium, also known as Marrubium, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Marrubium include alleviating digestive issues, reducing fever, and providing relief from respiratory problems such as asthma. Traditional herbal preparations of Marrubium include teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat various health conditions.
